result.stderr:
dockerwaiter 1.0.6
Copyright (C) 2026 sidelabs

  -c, --containers       Required. the container names that will be waited (they
                         must be comma separated if there is more than one)

  -d, --dockercompose    Required. the docker-compose filename that launch the
                         containers

  -t, --timeout          a timeout value in seconds for cleaning all the stuff
                         if it will not work, by default it will be 3600

  -l, --logPath          Path for export the logs of the docker-compose
                         containers. if not set, it will be this directory, and
                         a logfile by container

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.
